issues.description: Action type 'TrashFromHand' is correct, but missing 'optional' flag. Card text says 'You may trash' indicating optional cost.
Target filter incomplete. Must restrict to {Fish-Man} or {Merfolk} type Leader or Character cards only. Current 'ChooseOwnCharacterOrLeader' has no type restriction.
Action 'AttachDon' should specify 'rested' state. Card text says 'Give up to 2 rested DON!!' cards, implying cards must be in rested state before attachment.
